steps.title: Find the center value
steps.content:
The two solutions of $|4x-8|=k$ are symmetric around the value that makes the inside equal to zero:
$$4x-8=0$$
$$x=2$$

steps.title: Use symmetry of the solutions
steps.content: The two solutions have average $2$. Therefore their sum is $$2(2)=4$$ The answer is 4.
